message:
feat(fft): scaffold contract-first FFT module with transforms, plan cache, and helpers

Implement the fsci-fft crate API surface for packet P2C-005:

- Add transforms module: fft, ifft, rfft, irfft, fft2, ifft2, fftn
  with Complex64 type, FftOptions, BackendKind, WorkerPolicy, and
  TransformTrace instrumentation
- Add plan module: PlanCacheBackend with LRU eviction, PlanKey,
  PlanFingerprint, PlanMetadata, PlanningStrategy, and configurable
  CacheAdmissionPolicy
- Add helpers module: fftfreq, rfftfreq, fftshift_1d, ifftshift_1d
  matching SciPy/PocketFFT conventions
- Add Normalization enum (Forward/Backward/Ortho) and TransformKind
  enum at crate root
- Wire fsci-runtime workspace dependency for RuntimeMode integration
- Apply rustfmt formatting fixes to fsci-integrate benches/tests and
  fsci-runtime benches/tests (macro expansions, closure formatting,
  import ordering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
